description: Impute continuous features using training median and categorical features using training mode.

interface.input_shapes: X_train: pd.DataFrame, X_test: pd.DataFrame, cont_cols: list, cat_cols: list

usage_example: X_tr_imp, X_te_imp = transform(X_train, X_test, cont_cols=['age'], cat_cols=['city'])
known_pitfalls: Does not create indicator flags for missing values. Mode value falls back to 'missing' string if column is entirely empty.
